message:
feat: migrate Arcade, Clusters, Deploy to shared DashboardPage framework

* feat: gold standard kagent/kagenti cards, demo corner brackets, tabbed AI Agents

- Add corner bracket demo indicators (half on/half off card edge) replacing
  full yellow border for demo mode cards
- Add icons for all 15 kagent/kagenti card types in cardIcons.ts
- Add gold standard controls (sort, cluster filter, search, pagination) to
  8 kagent/kagenti list cards via CardControlsRow
- Fix DashboardGrid: pass drag handle through CardWrapper prop instead of
  absolute-positioned overlay that covered card titles
- Fix DashboardGrid: remove redundant gear/X hover buttons (CardWrapper
  already provides unified three-dot menu controls)
- Fix AI Agents page: add Kagenti/Kagent tab support by reading tab configs
  and swapping cards per tab with separate storage keys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: rugged demo corner brackets, card bezel shadows, tighter grid

- Demo corner brackets now use SVG paths with feTurbulence filter for
  a rugged hand-drawn look with smooth rounded curves
- Add inner/outer bezel box-shadow to glass cards for depth
- Remove white glass border sheen (transparent border)
- Tighten dashboard grid gap from 16px to 8px

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: show kagent/kagenti in AI provider dropdown during demo mode

When demo mode is active, kagent and kagenti now appear in the AI
provider dropdown even if they're not installed on the cluster.
This matches the behavior of kagent/kagenti cards which show demo
data. Also removes unused getDefaultCards import from AIAgents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: always show kagent/kagenti in provider dropdown with install links

Show kagent and kagenti in the AI provider dropdown regardless of
whether they are installed. When not available, display an install
link instead of hiding them entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: official kagent/kagenti icons, AI mission install, unified grid gap

- Replace kagent icon with official purple geometric K mark (#942DE7)
- Replace kagenti icon with container ship SVG matching their branding
- Add "Install with AI Mission" option in provider dropdown when a CLI
  agent is available, alongside manual install link
- Unify card grid gap to gap-2 across all dashboards (Deploy, Clusters,
  Dashboard, Arcade, GPU, CustomDashboard) to match DashboardPage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: shorter/smoother demo corners, propagate isDemoData for AI Agents stats

- Reduce demo corner bracket size from w-8 to w-5 and lower turbulence
  displacement scale from 1.5 to 1 for a subtler rugged effect
- Propagate isDemoFallback from useCache through useKagentiSummary so
  stat blocks correctly show demo styling when using fallback data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: migrate Arcade, Clusters, Deploy to shared DashboardPage

Replace manual DnD/card management boilerplate in three legacy
dashboards with the shared DashboardPage component. All three already
had config files — this just wires them up.

- Arcade: 417 → 60 lines (pure card grid, no domain logic)
- Clusters: 811 → 662 lines (preserves all modals, filters, cluster grid)
- Deploy: 622 → 214 lines (preserves deploy dialog, persistence CRs)
- DashboardPage: add rightExtra prop for header buttons

Net reduction: ~900 lines of duplicated DnD/modal wiring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>

---------

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
